meta.summary: A TAFFISH-maintained R/Bioconductor 3.23 bioinformatics visualization runtime with a stable tree plotting helper CLI.
meta.description: A TAFFISH-maintained R/Bioconductor 3.23 bioinformatics visualization runtime with a stable tree plotting helper CLI.

test: Rscript --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Rscript (R) version 4.6.0' >/dev/null && Rscript -e 'stopifnot(as.character(BiocManager::version()) == "3.23")' && bioviz-runtime-info | grep -F 'Bioconductor	3.23' >/dev/null

Rscript -e 'pkgs <- c("ape","treeio","ggtree","tidytree","ggplot2","svglite","ragg","optparse","jsonlite","readr","data.table","ggrepel","patchwork","cowplot","scales","viridis","RColorBrewer"); missing <- pkgs[!vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly=TRUE)]; if (length(missing)) stop(paste("missing", paste(missing, collapse=",")))'
bioviz-tree --version | grep -Fx 'bioviz-tree 0.1.0 (Bioconductor 3.23)' >/dev/null && bioviz-tree --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Tree plotting helper for Newick phylogenies' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-bioviz-tree-rect-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '%s
' '((seq1:0.1,seq2:0.2):0.3,(seq3:0.2,seq4:0.4):0.1);' > tree.nwk && printf '%b
' 'sample	group	region' 'seq1	A	leaf' 'seq2	A	leaf' 'seq3	B	root' 'seq4	B	root' > metadata.tsv && printf '%b
' 'sequence_id	label' 'seq1	Alpha one' 'seq2	Alpha two' 'seq3	Beta one' 'seq4	Beta two' > label-map.tsv && bioviz-tree --tree tree.nwk --metadata metadata.tsv --label-map label-map.tsv --color-by group --layout rectangular --formats pdf,png,svg --outdir out && test -s out/tree.pdf && test -s out/tree.png && test -s out/tree.svg && test -s out/tree_plot_summary.tsv && test -s out/run.manifest.json && grep -F 'metadata_matched_tips' out/tree_plot_summary.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'ggtree' out/versions.tsv >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-bioviz-tree-circ-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '%s
' '((a:0.1,b:0.2):0.3,(c:0.2,d:0.4):0.1);' > tree.nwk && bioviz-tree --tree tree.nwk --layout circular --formats png --hide-tip-labels --outdir out && test -s out/tree.png && grep -F 'layout	circular' out/tree_plot_summary.tsv >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Bioconductor bioinformatics visualization runtime
upstream.license: Multiple open-source licenses across Bioconductor, CRAN, R, and system packages
upstream.citation: Bioconductor project; package-specific citations are available from citation(package)

meta.summary: A TAFFISH-maintained R/Bioconductor 3.23 bioinformatics visualization runtime with a stable tree plotting helper CLI.
meta.description: A TAFFISH-maintained R/Bioconductor 3.23 bioinformatics visualization runtime with a stable tree plotting helper CLI.

test: Rscript --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Rscript (R) version 4.6.0' >/dev/null && Rscript -e 'stopifnot(as.character(BiocManager::version()) == "3.23")' && bioviz-runtime-info | grep -F 'Bioconductor	3.23' >/dev/null

Rscript -e 'pkgs <- c("ape","treeio","ggtree","tidytree","ggplot2","svglite","ragg","optparse","jsonlite","readr","data.table","ggrepel","patchwork","cowplot","scales","viridis","RColorBrewer"); missing <- pkgs[!vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly=TRUE)]; if (length(missing)) stop(paste("missing", paste(missing, collapse=",")))'
bioviz-tree --version | grep -Fx 'bioviz-tree 0.2.0 (Bioconductor 3.23)' >/dev/null && bioviz-tree --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Tree plotting helper for Newick phylogenies' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-bioviz-tree-rect-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '%s
' '((seq1:0.1,seq2:0.2):0.3,(seq3:0.2,seq4:0.4):0.1);' > tree.nwk && printf '%b
' 'sample	group	region' 'seq1	A	leaf' 'seq2	A	leaf' 'seq3	B	root' 'seq4	B	root' > metadata.tsv && printf '%b
' 'sequence_id	label' 'seq1	Alpha one with a long journal label' 'seq2	Alpha two with a long journal label' 'seq3	Beta one with a long journal label' 'seq4	Beta two with a long journal label' > label-map.tsv && bioviz-tree --tree tree.nwk --metadata metadata.tsv --label-map label-map.tsv --color-by group --layout rectangular --formats pdf,png,svg --style journal --title Journal Style Smoke --outdir out && test -s out/tree.pdf && test -s out/tree.png && test -s out/tree.svg && test -s out/tree_plot_summary.tsv && test -s out/run.manifest.json && grep -F 'metadata_matched_tips' out/tree_plot_summary.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'style	journal' out/tree_plot_summary.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'scale_bar	auto' out/tree_plot_summary.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'title	Journal Style Smoke' out/tree_plot_summary.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'plot_width' out/tree_plot_summary.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'ggtree' out/versions.tsv >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-bioviz-tree-circ-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '%s
' '((a:0.1,b:0.2):0.3,(c:0.2,d:0.4):0.1);' > tree.nwk && bioviz-tree --tree tree.nwk --layout circular --formats png --hide-tip-labels --outdir out && test -s out/tree.png && grep -F 'layout	circular' out/tree_plot_summary.tsv >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Bioconductor bioinformatics visualization runtime
